Volkswagen Beetle taxi drivers change a flat tire in the Cuautepec neighborhood of Mexico City, Friday, June 21, 2024. Mechanics in the area say driving a Volkswagen Beetle or “vocho” as it’s known in Mexico, is a dying tradition because parts have been harder to come by since Volkswagen halted production five years ago.
